evidence_excerpt: MRI head: 'Stable appearance of the lesion in the left frontoparietal region without enhancement.' Discharge condition: 'Ambulatory - Independent.' Persistent right-sided weakness noted; seizure regimen adjusted but no evidence of tumor progression.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Ongoing right-sided weakness on neuro exam and continued need for anti-seizure medications (discharged on lacosamide + divalproex; PRN lorazepam).

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Family reports patient 'seizing ... more or less continuously' prior to arrival; previously 'no seizures since his diagnosis.'
Seizure medications were adjusted during admission; discharged on lacosamide 100 mg BID and divalproex 1500 mg BID (PRN lorazepam).
Discharge condition: 'Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Level of Consciousness: Alert and interactive.' Seizures controlled with inpatient treatment.

notes_on_uncertainty: Exact diagnosis date and long-term follow-up after discharge are not documented. Index time was set to the initial glioma diagnosis; all events in this record occur long after that. Seizure recurrence likely related to missed medication per history, but causality cannot be confirmed from the record.
